title: iria barteri
intro: Iria barteri, also known as the African iria, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Iria barteri include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and swelling, and protect against infections. Iria barteri can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, allowing for its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
